This [[Minigames|Minigame]] is acquired from getting RNG <100 in the [[Lottery Machine|Lottery]].

Rules:

* Tap on a square to change the color of the blocks around it to its color.
* There are 50 stages in total.
* To progress to the next stage, make all squares one color within a certain number of moves.
* Many puzzles have multiple solutions, but only one will be listed here.

Reading the solution:

* Columns are referenced alphabetically: A, B, C, D, E
* Rows are referenced numerically: 1, 2, 3, 5, 5
* Explanatory image: [https://www.reddit.com/media?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpreview.redd.it%2Fqvxkexxqin1c1.jpg%3Fwidth%3D320%26format%3Dpjpg%26auto%3Dwebp%26s%3D6ad7614987ecd6674a29c23f50e4d383d17ee4d3]

{| class="wikitable"
!Stage
!Solution

|-
|1
|Any

|-
|2
|B1

|-
|3
|Any B

|-
|4
|B2

|-
|5
|B1, B3

|-
|6
|A2

|-
|7
|A2, C2

|-
|8
|A2, C2

|-
|9
|B1, B3

|-
|10
|B2, A1

|-
|11
|D2, A3

|-
|12
|B2, D2

|-
|13
|B2, A1

|-
|14
|C2

|-
|15
|D4, B3

|-
|16
|D2, B3, A1

|-
|17
|B2, D2

|-
|18
|C4, D2

|-
|19
|C3, D1, A3, B2

|-
|20
|B3, C2, D3

|-
|21
|B1, D2, B4

|-
|22
|B2, C3, A1, A4

|-
|23
|B2, B4, C1

|-
|24
|D2, D4, A2

|-
|25
|C3

|-
|26
|C3

|-
|27
|B2, D4

|-
|28
|C3

|-
|29
|A3, E3

|-
|30
|B3, C5

|-
|31
|B2, C3, D4

|-
|32
|A5, C3, E1

|-
|33
|C3, A3, D5, A1

|-
|34
|B3, D4

|-
|35
|E2, D5, A4, A1, C2

|-
|36
|C3, E3, A3

|-
|37
|C3, A3

|-
|38
|C2, C4, A3

|-
|39
|B3, D3, C1

|-
|40
|E5, B5, C2

|-
|41
|A3, D1, C3

|-
|42
|C4, C1, B3

|-
|43
|B3, D1, A1

|-
|44
|C4, D3, A5

|-
|45
|C3, A5, A1

|-
|46
|E1, A5

|-
|47
|C4, C1, B3

|-
|48
|D3, A3

|-
|49
|E5, E2, C2, A5

|-
|50
|C4, C2, D1

|}

Solutions courtesy of [https://www.reddit.com/r/SuperSnail_US/comments/180bp9z/snail_flip_solutions/ /u/mrniceguy7766 on Reddit]

[[Category:Guides]]
[[Category:Minigames]]
